title: Former Israeli Premiers Join in Bid to Oust Netanyahu in Elections
summary_full: Naftali Bennett, a right-wing politician, and Yair Lapid, a centrist, will merge parties for a vote later this year.
summary_public: Naftali Bennett, a right-wing politician, and Yair Lapid, a centrist, will merge parties for a vote later this year.
